title: Classic American French Toast
description: A delicious breakfast recipe featuring thick slices of bread dipped in a mixture of eggs and milk, then cooked in a skillet until golden brown.

ingredients.name: french milk
ingredients.notes: whole milk or a non-dairy alternative

instructions: In a shallow dish, whisk together eggs, milk, and vanilla extract (if using).
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Dip each slice of bread into the egg mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Place the coated bread slices on the skillet or griddle.
Cook for 3-4 minutes on the first side, or until golden brown.
Flip the bread slices over and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the other side is also golden brown.
Repeat with the remaining bread slices.
Serve warm with maple syrup drizzled on top (if desired).
